narrative:
Dayton 3-I (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,161 registered voters, with 58.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.3 percentage points.
